description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build_maven job in the build stage that runs the commands: echo "build maven.....", echo "mvn clean", echo "done". Add a test_springboot job in the test stage that runs: echo "run java test.....", echo "java -test", echo "done". Add a deploy_springboot job in the deploy stage that runs: echo "deploy springboot....", echo "run mvn install", echo "done". No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are required.
